{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mecha Gut
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10834
|idx=39
|description=This section of the appendix is wrapped with a layer of high hardness alloy. Tests have shown that it has a significant positive effect on improving digestion.
|skill=
|hp=2362
|def=142
|atk=122
|rush=131
|gene1=In Mecha Form, {race} HP +600
|gene2=In Mecha Form, {race} ATK +60
|gene3=In Mecha Form, {race} RUSH +60
|gene4=In Mecha Form, {race} DEF +60
|gene7=In Mecha Form, {race} HARD +1% (Awakened)
|}}
